command_summary: pi non-interactive run with no tools and the source design-craft skill explicitly loaded

style_authority.note: Recognized adaptive platform intent and semantic DESIGN.md roles.

reference_selection.note: Covered iOS, Android, accessibility, adaptivity, theming, and motion concerns.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Focused on platform conformance and did not apply a decorative mobile redesign.

evidence_level.note: Called out missing source, build, simulator, emulator, and device evidence.

verified_boundary.note: Mostly careful, but some prompt-given facts were inconsistently described as wholly unverified.

design_moves.note: Provided platform navigation, type, controls, token, motion, and adaptive layout moves with a parity matrix.

scope_control.note: Stayed within native UI quality and runtime validation scope.
